cloud_hsm_cluster_id.description: The identifier of the AWS CloudHSM cluster associated with the custom key store.

connection_state.description: The current connection state of the custom key store (e.g., CONNECTED or DISCONNECTED).

creation_date.description: The date and time when the custom key store was created.

custom_key_store_id.description: A unique identifier for the custom key store.

custom_key_store_name.description: The name assigned to the custom key store.

id.description: The Terraform identifier for the custom key store resource.

trust_anchor_certificate.description: The trust anchor certificate used by the custom key store.
